title: Killer Attribute
description: in the 1.0.2 mod version items add: mask Maykl Mayers and knife
body:
Killer Attribute is a Minecraft mod that immerses players into the role of a sinister assassin or horror movie slasher by introducing a comprehensive system of deadly weapons, specialized armor by creepypasta and film killers. The core idea revolves around enhancing combat with a dark, thematic twist, allowing players to harness the powers of infamous killers through gear that grants specific, often lethal, bonuses.

🗡️ Core Concept & Inspiration
The mod draws heavy inspiration from iconic horror figures and creepypasta legends (like Jason Voorhees or Michael Myers). It focuses on:

Thematic Gear: Weapons and armor sets modeled after infamous killers (in the future, we plan to make more armor and weapons)

🛠️ Technical Details
Requirements: Forge, Minecraft Java Edition 1.20.1+.

Performance: Lightweight compared to larger overhaul mods, focusing solely on items and gear.

🎯 Use Cases
Role-Playing Servers: Ideal for horror-themed RPG servers where players assume killer roles.

PvP Arenas: Enhances combat with strategic depth through attribute stacking.

Story Maps: Can be used in custom maps inspired by horror games like Dead by Daylight.

✅ Conclusion
Killer Attribute is a specialized mod for players seeking to inject horror movie thrills into Minecraft. By combining thematic gear, it delivers a unique experience centered around becoming the ultimate killer. Whether for role-playing or competitive PvP, this mod offers a dark, customizable, and immersive twist on combat.
